title: hyoseris hirta
intro: Hyoseris hirta, also known as rough seed everlasting or hairy hyoseris, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Hyoseris hirta include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as asthma and bronchitis. Hyoseris hirta is prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
